title: Electrode assemblies, battery cells, batteries, and electrical devices

events.title: Application filed by Contemporary Amperex Technology Co Ltd

classifications.description: Cells with wound or folded electrodes
Li-accumulators
Rocking-chair batteries, i.e. batteries with lithium insertion or intercalation in both electrodes; Lithium-ion batteries
Construction or manufacture of accumulators having only flat construction elements, i.e. flat positive electrodes, flat negative electrodes and flat separators
Construction or manufacture of accumulators having only wound construction elements, i.e. wound positive electrodes, wound negative electrodes and wound separators
Safety or regulating additives or arrangements in electrodes, separators or electrolyte
Electrodes composed of, or comprising, active material
Methods of deposition of the material by coating on electrode collectors
Electrodes for accumulators with non-aqueous electrolyte, e.g. for lithium-accumulators; Processes of manufacture thereof
Electrodes based on mixed oxides or hydroxides, or on mixtures of oxides or hydroxides, e.g. LiCoOx
Electrodes based on carbonaceous material, e.g. graphite-intercalation compounds or CFx
Processes of manufacture

Selection of substances as active materials, active masses, active liquids of inorganic oxides or hydroxides of nickel, cobalt or iron of mixed oxides or hydroxides containing iron, cobalt or nickel for inserting or intercalating light metals, e.g. LiNiO2, LiCoO2 or LiCoOxFy

Primary casings; Jackets or wrappings characterised by their shape or physical structure prismatic or rectangular

Manufacturing or production processes characterised by the final manufactured product

abstract: The application provides an electrode assembly, a battery cell, a battery and electric equipment. The electrode assembly comprises a positive electrode plate and a negative electrode plate which are overlapped. The positive electrode plate comprises a positive electrode current collector and a positive electrode active material layer, the positive electrode current collector comprises a positive electrode coating area and a positive electrode lug, the positive electrode active material layer is at least partially coated in the positive electrode coating area, the positive electrode lug is connected to the end part of the positive electrode coating area along the first direction, and the first direction is perpendicular to the superposition direction of the positive electrode plate and the negative electrode plate. The negative electrode sheet includes a negative electrode active material layer, and a positive electrode active material layer and a negative electrode active material layer are arranged to face each other, and both ends of the negative electrode active material layer exceed the positive electrode active material layer in a first direction. The positive electrode active material layer includes a positive electrode main body portion and a positive electrode edge portion, the positive electrode main body portion being provided with the positive electrode edge portion on a side facing away from the positive electrode tab in the first direction, the positive electrode edge portion being configured such that a unit area capacity of the positive electrode edge portion is smaller than a unit area capacity of the positive electrode main body portion.
claims:
1.一种电极组件，其特征在于，包括叠加设置的正极极片和负极极片；1. An electrode assembly, characterized in that it comprises a positive electrode and a negative electrode stacked together;
      
      
         所述正极极片包括正极集流体和正极活性物质层，所述正极集流体包括正极涂覆区和正极极耳，所述正极活性物质层至少部分涂覆于所述正极涂覆区，所述正极极耳连接于所述正极涂覆区沿第一方向的端部，所述第一方向垂直于所述正极极片和所述负极极片的叠加方向；The positive electrode sheet includes a positive current collector and a positive active material layer. The positive current collector includes a positive coating area and a positive electrode tab. The positive active material layer is at least partially coated on the positive coating area. The positive electrode tab is connected to the end of the positive coating area along a first direction, which is perpendicular to the stacking direction of the positive electrode sheet and the negative electrode sheet.
      
      
         所述负极极片包括负极集流体和涂覆于所述负极集流体表面的负极活性物质层，所述正极活性物质层与所述负极活性物质层面对设置，在所述第一方向上，所述负极活性物质层的两端均超出所述正极活性物质层；The negative electrode sheet includes a negative current collector and a negative active material layer coated on the surface of the negative current collector. The positive active material layer and the negative active material layer are disposed opposite each other. In the first direction, both ends of the negative active material layer extend beyond the positive active material layer.
      
      
         所述正极活性物质层包括正极主体部和正极边缘部，所述正极主体部沿所述第一方向背离所述正极极耳的一侧设有所述正极边缘部，所述正极边缘部被配置为：所述正极边缘部的单位面积容量小于所述正极主体部的单位面积容量。The positive electrode active material layer includes a positive electrode body portion and a positive electrode edge portion. The positive electrode body portion is provided on the side away from the positive electrode tab along the first direction. The positive electrode edge portion is configured such that the unit area capacity of the positive electrode edge portion is smaller than the unit area capacity of the positive electrode body portion.

2.根据权利要求1所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述正极边缘部至少为两个，两个所述正极边缘部分别位于所述正极主体部沿所述第一方向的两侧。2. The electrode assembly according to claim 1, wherein there are at least two positive electrode edges, and the two positive electrode edges are respectively located on both sides of the positive electrode body along the first direction.

3.根据权利要求2所述的电极组件，其特征在于，在两个所述正极边缘部中，靠近所述正极极耳的所述正极边缘部的至少部分厚度小于所述正极主体部的厚度。3. The electrode assembly according to claim 2, wherein, in the two positive electrode edge portions, at least a portion of the thickness of the positive electrode edge portion near the positive electrode tab is less than the thickness of the positive electrode body portion.

4.根据权利要求1所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述正极边缘部的活性材料与所述正极边缘部的重量比小于所述正极主体部的活性材料与所述正极主体部的重量比，以使所述正极边缘部的单位面积容量小于所述正极主体部的单位面积容量。4. The electrode assembly according to claim 1, wherein the weight ratio of the active material at the positive electrode edge to the positive electrode edge is less than the weight ratio of the active material at the positive electrode body to the positive electrode body, so that the unit area capacity of the positive electrode edge is less than the unit area capacity of the positive electrode body.

5.根据权利要求1所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述正极边缘部的活性材料的克容量小于所述正极主体部的活性材料的克容量，以使所述正极边缘部的单位面积容量小于所述正极主体部的单位面积容量。5. The electrode assembly according to claim 1, wherein the specific capacity of the active material at the edge of the positive electrode is less than the specific capacity of the active material at the main body of the positive electrode, so that the unit area capacity at the edge of the positive electrode is less than the unit area capacity at the main body of the positive electrode.

7.根据权利要求1所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述正极边缘部的活性材料的粒径大于所述正极主体部的活性材料的粒径。7. The electrode assembly according to claim 1, wherein the particle size of the active material at the edge of the positive electrode is larger than the particle size of the active material in the main body of the positive electrode.

8.根据权利要求1所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述正极边缘部在所述第一方向上的尺寸大于0.5mm。8. The electrode assembly according to claim 1, wherein the dimension of the positive electrode edge portion in the first direction is greater than 0.5 mm.
9.根据权利要求1所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述正极边缘部环绕所述正极主体部设置。9. The electrode assembly according to claim 1, wherein the positive electrode edge portion is disposed around the positive electrode body portion.

10.根据权利要求1所述的电极组件，其特征在于，10. The electrode assembly according to claim 1, characterized in that,
      
      
         所述负极活性物质层包括负极主体部和连接于所述负极主体部的负极边缘部，所述负极边缘部的背离所述负极主体部的一端超出所述正极活性物质层，且在所述正极极片和所述负极极片的叠加方向上，所述负极边缘部至少一部分与所述正极活性物质层重叠，所述负极活性物质层被配置为：所述负极边缘部的单位面积容量大于所述负极主体部的单位面积容量。The negative electrode active material layer includes a negative electrode body portion and a negative electrode edge portion connected to the negative electrode body portion. One end of the negative electrode edge portion, facing away from the negative electrode body portion, extends beyond the positive electrode active material layer. In the stacking direction of the positive electrode sheet and the negative electrode sheet, at least a portion of the negative electrode edge portion overlaps with the positive electrode active material layer. The negative electrode active material layer is configured such that the unit area capacity of the negative electrode edge portion is greater than the unit area capacity of the negative electrode body portion.

11.根据权利要求10所述的电极组件，其特征在于，位于所述正极主体部沿所述第一方向背离所述正极极耳的一侧的所述正极边缘部与所述负极主体部在所述叠加方向上至少部分地重叠。11. The electrode assembly according to claim 10, wherein the positive electrode edge portion located on the side of the positive electrode body portion facing away from the positive electrode tab along the first direction at least partially overlaps the negative electrode body portion in the superposition direction.

12.根据权利要求10所述的电极组件，其特征在于，位于所述正极主体部沿所述第一方向背离所述正极极耳的一侧的所述正极边缘部与所述负极边缘部在所述叠加方向上至少部分地重叠。12. The electrode assembly according to claim 10, wherein the positive electrode edge portion located on the side of the positive electrode body portion facing away from the positive electrode tab along the first direction at least partially overlaps the negative electrode edge portion in the superposition direction.

13.根据权利要求10所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述负极边缘部中的活性材料与所述负极边缘部的重量比大于所述负极主体部中的活性材料与所述负极主体部的重量比，以使所述负极边缘部的单位面积容量大于所述负极主体部的单位面积容量。13. The electrode assembly according to claim 10, wherein the weight ratio of the active material in the negative electrode edge portion to the negative electrode edge portion is greater than the weight ratio of the active material in the negative electrode body portion to the negative electrode body portion, so that the unit area capacity of the negative electrode edge portion is greater than the unit area capacity of the negative electrode body portion.

14.根据权利要求10所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述负极边缘部中的活性材料的克容量大于所述负极主体部中的活性材料的克容量，以使所述负极边缘部的单位面积容量大于所述负极主体部的单位面积容量。14. The electrode assembly according to claim 10, wherein the specific capacity of the active material in the negative electrode edge portion is greater than the specific capacity of the active material in the negative electrode body portion, so that the unit area capacity of the negative electrode edge portion is greater than the unit area capacity of the negative electrode body portion.

16.根据权利要求10所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述负极边缘部中的活性材料的粒径小于所述负极主体部中的活性材料的粒径。16. The electrode assembly according to claim 10, wherein the particle size of the active material in the negative electrode edge portion is smaller than the particle size of the active material in the negative electrode body portion.

18.根据权利要求17所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述负极边缘部至少为两个，两个所述负极边缘部分别位于所述负极主体部沿所述第一方向的两侧。18. The electrode assembly according to claim 17, wherein there are at least two negative electrode edges, and the two negative electrode edges are respectively located on both sides of the negative electrode body along the first direction.

19.根据权利要求18所述的电极组件，其特征在于，在两个所述负极边缘部中，靠近所述负极极耳的所述负极边缘部的至少部分的厚度小于所述负极主体部的厚度，远离所述负极极耳的所述负极边缘部的厚度等于所述负极主体部的厚度。19. The electrode assembly according to claim 18, wherein, in the two negative electrode edges, at least a portion of the thickness of the negative electrode edge closer to the negative electrode tab is less than the thickness of the negative electrode body, and the thickness of the negative electrode edge farther from the negative electrode tab is equal to the thickness of the negative electrode body.

20.根据权利要求10所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述负极边缘部的与所述正极活性物质层在所述叠加方向上重叠的部分在所述第一方向上的尺寸大于0.5mm。20. The electrode assembly according to claim 10, wherein the portion of the negative electrode edge that overlaps with the positive electrode active material layer in the stacking direction has a dimension greater than 0.5 mm in the first direction.
21.根据权利要求10所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述负极边缘部环绕所述负极主体部设置。21. The electrode assembly according to claim 10, wherein the negative electrode edge portion is disposed around the negative electrode body portion.

22.根据权利要求10-21任一项所述的电极组件，其特征在于，所述负极边缘部包括第一部分和第二部分，所述第一部分与所述正极活性物质层在所述叠加方向上重叠，所述第二部分超出所述正极活性物质层。22. The electrode assembly according to any one of claims 10-21, wherein the negative electrode edge portion comprises a first portion and a second portion, the first portion overlapping the positive electrode active material layer in the stacking direction, and the second portion extending beyond the positive electrode active material layer.
25.一种用电设备，其特征在于，包括权利要求24所述的电池，所述电池用于提供电能。25. An electrical device, characterized in that it includes the battery of claim 24, the battery being used to provide electrical energy.
